titleStmt.title: SII 36.275: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 275. (A.R. No. 275 of 1910.) TIRUVAḌANDAI, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the west base of the central shrine in the Varāha Perumāḷ temple.

summary.p: Gift of 90 sheep by Mummuḍichōḻa Brahmādhirājar of Chirudāvūr in Āmūr-nāḍu, a subdivision of Āmūrk-kōṭṭam, for a perpetual lamp to be lighted in the Āḻvar temple of Tiruviḍavandai, a dēvadāṉa in Paḍuvūr-nāḍu of Āmūrk-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅkoṅḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam. The local shepherd received the sheep and agreed to measure out 90 nāḻis of ghee to the temple and the local sabhā agreed to maintain the lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī maṉunītimuṟai vaḷara mānilattai potu nīkki ceṅkolāl karuṅkali kaṭintu veṇkuṭai niḻal vīrasiṅṅāsanattu vīṟṟi
run=taruḷina korājakecarivarmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrī rājamahen=tiratevarkku yāṇṭu 2 Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu Āmūrk koṭṭattu
p paṭuvūr nāṭṭu tevatāna tiruviṭavantai Āḻvarkku Ikkoṭṭattu Āmūr nāṭṭuc ciṟutavūrp pūtalic celvakkovala kūttanāṉa mummuṭicoḻa brahmamādhirā
jar Āḻvārkku vaiytta tirunan=tāviḷakku Onṟukku viṭṭa cāvāmūvāp perāṭu toṇṇūṟuṅ kaiykkoṇṭu It tirunantāviḷakku Onṟukku nicatam Uḻakku
neyyāka Āṇṭuvarai toṇṇūṟṟu nāḻi ney Āḻvār paṇṭārattu Aḷakka kaṭavenāka
Ivvāṭu toṇṇūṟuṅ kaiykkoṇṭen Ivvūr Irukkum nammaṭi Aracu tāmotiranen Ivāṭu kai
kkoṇṭu Ittaṉma muṭṭāmai celuttuvarak kaṭavemānom Ivvūr cavaiyom Itu śrī vayiṣṇavar
rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 36.275 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
